title: Creative Business Pitch
scenario: Create a 30-second elevator pitch for a startup that specializes in creating immersive virtual reality experiences. The pitch should highlight the company's unique selling proposition and be delivered in the first person.
constraints: Must be delivered in the first person

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated text is under 100 words and delivered in the first person.
Evaluate the uniqueness and creativity of the pitch.
Assess if the pitch clearly communicates the company's unique selling proposition.
